title: Analysis Cache Manager (TTL, manual flush, prefetch)
description: Extend the Product Cache (P1.12) with a management layer in lib/cache/manager.ts. Features: TTL enforcement (7-day read-through eviction with configurable override), manual flush via Options > Privacy, prefetch heuristic (pre-warm cache for products in current search results page), cache size dashboard (MB used / quota). Exposes storageStats() for the Options page. Backed by same IndexedDB store as P1.12 — no schema migration needed. TDD for flush, prefetch trigger, and stats reporting.
